channel.title: Her Miles
channel.description: Running plans & motivation for women who move

item.title: How to Keep Running When It's 90°F: A Hot-Weather Survival Guide
item.description: How to run safely in hot weather: timing, hydration, gear, and pace tips to keep your summer running going strong without overheating.

item.title: Couch to 5K: A 9-Week Running Plan for Beginners
item.description: Complete beginner's guide to training for your first 5K
